feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: how to import primary form item in data transfer workbench
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to upload/import primary form item specifically on outgoing payment in data transfer workbench can anyone assist me? we need to upload bulk data instead of manual updating in JE. Thanks.

entry.title: Cannot import Journal Entry via Import from Excel (Date Error)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
I get an error when i try to upload JE from "Import From Excel functionality"

Everything is done as in Preparing a Microsoft Excel Import File for Journal Entry 

But still get this error for posting date field.
Invalid value "YYYY-MM-DD" in row 1, column 3, for field "Posting Date[OJDT.RefDate]"

 



Version of sap B1 : SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.311) SP 2511 (Security) HOTFIX1

entry.title: Modules << Business Partners << Batch Print OR Mail Customer Aging Letters(BUP20001) does not print
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We are currently experiencing a system-wide issue in SAP Business One where Coresuite is not generating any outputs (Email, PDF, or Excel). This is affecting multiple users and disrupting business operations.

The issue occurs in the following areas:

  • Business Partners → Batch Print
  • Mail Customer Aging Letters (BUP20001)

Observed behavior:
When attempting to generate output, the message “Coresuite Designer: Email” briefly appears for a few seconds, then disappears without producing any result.

Additional findings:

  • Coresuite Designer is accessible and appears to run within SAP Business One.
  • However, there is no corresponding Coresuite Windows service running on the server.
  • This suggests that the backend runtime/engine may be missing or not properly installed, which could explain why all output functions (PDF, Excel, Email) are failing.

Question:
Has anyone encountered a similar issue, and could you advise on how to restore or reinstall the required backend service/runtime for Coresuite?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: Shared Parameters in Business One Webclient UI API App
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently developing a webclient extension for our SAP Business One Webclient and I ran into an issue regarding the shared parameters. We have this extension already build for the desktop client for Business One and use the shared parameters as a main parameter source to build a URL. I did not find any way to intialize the shared parameters in the webclient code yet. In the documentation from SAP i also did not find anything about this issue.

Does anyone here maybe has an idea to fix this problem or knows the function is not added in this context.

Best regards 

Maurice Schneider

entry.title: How can I set up fields for TmSp_GetDefaultElementsforCR automated?
entry.content:
My company has a Database with 6 schemata (what Business One calls Companies).

a) How can I set up the fields of TmSp_GetDefaultElementsforCR (In Business One "Default Elements for Crystal Report") automated? For example, I'd need the field "foo" in all schemata with a given translation in English/Spanish/German/French.

b) How can I copy the whole bunch of a custom field (foo with all its translations, might be more than the four listed in a) into another schema?

entry.title: SAP B1 SDK with Visual Studio 2026
entry.content:
Hi Devs,

For several years now the latest version of Microsoft Visual Studio that is supported by SAP for SAP B1 Add-on development is Visual Studio 2019 (as far as I know).  The mainstream lifecycle for VS2019 ended 2 years ago and we are currently in the extend lifetime of this application which also ends in three years. In addition to this, later versions of Microsoft Visual Studio have advanced features as well as capability of AI assistance.

Does SAP have in its pipeline plans to start supporting later versions of Microsoft Visual Studio? If this is not done before the extended lifetime ends, we will have a problem with supporting our customers.

entry.title: AP Aging Query Not Matching SAP Business One Aging Report
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I am currently developing a custom query for the Accounts Payable Aging report in SAP Business One. However, the total amount returned by my query does not match the standard SAP Business One Aging report.
Below is the query I am using:

SELECT T0.[DocNum], T0.[CardCode], T0.[CardName], T0.[DocDate], T0.[DocTotal] FROM OPCH T0 INNER JOIN OVPM T1 ON T0.[ReceiptNum] = T1.[DocEntry] INNER JOIN OACT T2 ON T0.[CtlAccount] = T2.[AcctCode] WHERE
T0.[CANCELED] ='N' and T0.[DocDate] <=[%0]
and
(T0.[DocStatus]='O' or T0.[DocStatus]<>'O' and T1.[DocDate] >[%0])
and
(
T2.[AcctCode]='403100' or
T2.[AcctCode]='403200' or
T2.[AcctCode]='403300' or
T2.[AcctCode]='403400' or
T2.[AcctCode]='403500'
) and T1.[Canceled] <>'Y'

My requirement is to include:
Open invoices as of the selected date
Closed invoices that were paid after the selected date
Anyone can help me please

entry.title: Renew an SSL certificate in SAP Business One 10
entry.content:
I needed to renew the SSL certificates for the various services in SAP Business One 10.0.

The SAP version is installed on Windows Server with SQL Server,

https://xxx:50000 → Service Layer
https://xxxx:6020 → Gateway API
https://xxxx:40000 → SLD
https://xxxx:40020 → SLD
https://xxxx (port 443/80) → Web Client

Can anyone explain or share some knowledge on how to renew the SSL file?

Thank you

entry.title: Conditional display in PLD
entry.content:
Hello

In PLD, I have a field F_225 which has 'Database' as source type and the data that is to be extracted to this field comes from a column in the database table which is of type NVARCHAR.

If the data in F_225 is blank or NULL, I need to display a specific text 'Not Defined', else I need to display the actual data.

Grateful for any hints on how to achieve this.

Thanks

Mukhtar

entry.title: SLD DB Export/ Import issue
entry.content:
We have an issue where the system admin attempts to do an export for the DB, but by mistake he does import, and the database is being overwritten to the last successful backup

Is there a way to create a user on the SLD and limit his permissions to the export operation rather than import? or is there any way to avoid this? woraround? tool to be added to the SLD? anything

entry.title: Closed Production Order SAPB1 generate JE to Finished Goods Inventory Account
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Is there a way in SAPB1, during closing a production order the value of the variance is not posted to debit/credit of the Finished Goods inventory Account. My user does not want to affect the item cost of the finished goods. 

Regards,

Erwin

entry.title: SAP B1 GRPO posting wrong amount to Inventory acct for Serial/Batch Valuation Method
entry.content:
In SAP Business One, we are using the Serial/Batch Valuation Method, which is designed to track costs at the specific batch level. SAP states that if the same batch number is received multiple times with different costs, the batch cost may appear to become an "average".

We have 3 Goods Receipt POs (GRPO) for an item with batch UMC. GRPO 2500082 with unit price $21,000, GRPO 2600109 with unit price $22,500 and GRPO 2600133 with unit price $22,500. Each GRPO has 1 qty of the item.

The 1st GRPO 2500082 has cost $21,000 recorded in the Batches and Serial Inventory Audit Report, which is correct.

The 2nd GRPO 2600109 has cost $21,750 recorded in the Batches and Serial Inventory Audit Report, which is also correct. Since average cost is ($21,000 + $22,500) / 2 qty = $21,750.

However the 3rd GRPO 2600133 has cost $22,250 recorded in the Batches and Serial Inventory Audit Report, which looks wrong. The average cost should be ($21,000 + $22,500 + $22,500) / 3 = $22,000.

So why did SAP record $22,250 as the cost, instead of $22,000?

entry.title: SAP Business One 10.0 FP2505 DEMO (MS SQL, German localization – DE)
entry.content:
Hi all,

I’m currently looking for the SAP Business One 10.0 FP2505 demo database (MS SQL, German localization – DE) and haven’t been able to locate it via the latest SAP Help Portal demo database overview.

The current catalog only lists FP2508 / FP2602 versions, and we specifically need FP2505 for version-aligned testing (schema and behaviour consistency).

Has anyone:

  • come across a direct download location for the FP2505 DE demo DB, or
  • retained a copy internally / knows where it can still be retrieved

Many thanks.

entry.title: Default Price List Issue in Inventory Transfer
entry.content:
Dear Team,

One of the users does not have authorization for the Last Purchase Price. When the user attempts to open the Inventory Transfer window, the system displays an error message related to this authorization.

Currently, for all users, the Inventory Transfer window is defaulting the Price List in the header as Last Purchase Price. Due to this, users without the required authorization are unable to access the document.

Kindly advise how we can change the default Price List in the Inventory Transfer window to an alternative Price List, so that users without authorization for Last Purchase Price can open the document without any issues.

Thanks 
Janeesh TG

entry.title: Error while installing the Business one sdk for SAP B1 V B110002602HF_1-70004131
entry.content:
I dealing with an error when trying to install the sdk in a new computer, the computer had no sap b1 installed before this, when installing the sdk i get these errors from the installer log:  

Error 1935.An error occurred during the installation of assembly component {98CB24AD-52FB-DB5F-A01F-C8B3B9A1E18E}. HRESULT: 0x80070091. assembly interface: IAssemblyCacheItem, function: Commit, assembly name: Microsoft.VC80.CRT,version="8.0.50727.4053",type="win32",publicKeyToken="1fc8b3b9a1e18e3b",processorArchitecture="x86"
MSI (s) (78:FC) [10:06:13:032]: Product: SAP Business One Software Development Kit -- Error 1935.An error occurred during the installation of assembly component {98CB24AD-52FB-DB5F-A01F-C8B3B9A1E18E}. HRESULT: 0x80070091. assembly interface: IAssemblyCacheItem, function: Commit, assembly name: Microsoft.VC80.CRT,version="8.0.50727.4053",type="win32",publicKeyToken="1fc8b3b9a1e18e3b",processorArchitecture="x86"

How could i solve this ? since all the other software installed just fine

entry.title: Remote Support Platform User Locked
entry.content:
Hi All

How to unlock RSP User?  It is alway incorrect though I type the correct same password.

entry.title: Reconhecimento da receita na entrega de mercadoria
entry.content:
configurando o fluxo de faturamento antecipado estou feito (Entrega Futura) e o sistema está ignorando o diferencial da receita, registrando o crédito na conta de resultado logo na emissão da NF da Futura.

Cenário Atual (O Problema)

  • NF de Saída (Futura): O sistema está creditando diretamente a conta de Receita ( 3.01.01.01.01), quando deveria creditar a conta Redutora ( 1.01.03.01.03).

  • Entrega: Como a receita já foi confiável na nota, a entrega realiza apenas a baixa de estoque (Estoque vs CPV) e impostos, deixando de fazer o "swap" contábil (Redutora vs Receita).

O Objetivo (Fluxo Correto)

O objetivo é que a contabilização siga o princípio da competência, onde a receita só "nasce" com a saída física:

  1. Na NF de Saída (Futura):

    • Débito: PN (Cliente)

    • Crédito: 1.01.03.01.03 ((-) Clientes Nacionais Venda Futura) — Conta Redutora/Passivo.

  2. Na Entrega:

    • Débito: 1.01.03.01.03 (Limpa a conta redutora).

    • Crédito: 3.01.01.01.01 (Reconhece a Receita de Venda).

    • Mais os lançamentos de CPV e Impostos.

 

Ambiente:

  • Versão: SAP Business One versão 10.0 para SAP HANA (10.00.200) FP 2208.

entry.title: reduce Field Length of System Database Field
entry.content:
Hi All

It is not possible to reduce the Field length of Sales Order Customer PO Reference Field (NumatCard) from 200 to 100 right?

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Import Country of Origin Item Master Data
entry.content:
Hi, 
I am trying to DTW country of origin for items but its not working.  

It shows imported but the country is not in SAP.

My DTW file is
ItemCode ItemCountryOrg
ItemCode CountryOrg
1593 IT

Item code 1539 has a country code of Italy

Any ideas?

entry.title: Recurring Transactions in SAP B1 not working properly
entry.content:
The Recurring Transaction Templates are setup properly

but the dates are not correct in the Recurring Transaction list

Subject:  Recurring Transactions

  1. They create many recurring transactions in the system
  2. All set to go out on the 10th of the month to many customers (AR Invoices)
  3. Example:
    1. Recurring Transaction Template setup in 1/1/26
    2. Set to expire on 12/31/26
    3. Set to fire monthly on the 10th of the month
    4. An AR Invoice is linked properly
  4. When they open the Recurring Transaction window in Sap is displays the pending transactions
  5. Issue 1:
    1. Almost all now show the next transaction to occur on 1/10/26 instead of 5/10/26
    2. But they have generated them for these templates every month up until now
    3. So the only way they can use this is to manually edit the posting date in the screen for every one (about 60 plus) to be the proper month

 

  1. Issue 2:
    1. Some of the templates for customers do not show up in the pending Recurring Transactions window at all

 

 

If anyone has any ideas = please let me know because they have to get this corrected by the 10th of may
